title: Run Orbit rerun execution
goal: Let Samwise orchestrate an approved Orbit rerun lane through a real multiagent execution loop instead of acting as the implementation owner.

steps.text: Load the active Orbit execution artifacts plus the declared handoff artifacts for this attempt, beginning with `Docs/Orbit/Execution/Orbit-Build-Rerun-Checklist.md`, `Docs/Orbit/Execution/Orbit-Product-Acceptance-Checklist.md`, the explicit attempt prep path as the primary planning-derived handoff artifact, and the explicit `retrospectivePath` named by the intent parameters.

Restate the current attempt boundary, explicit evidence paths, exact lane branch, declared worktree path, and commit authorization mode before any implementation work begins. If the worktree is not materialized yet, materialize/bootstrap/preflight it before the first implementation handoff.

Declare the active session map for implementation, product review, interaction-quality review, validation review, and retrospective closeout. If any required session route is missing or ambiguous, stop and repair the routing before implementation begins.

If the active worktree path is outside the primary repository root, warn AJ that this environment may trigger approval prompts for bootstrap, build, test, or file-writing commands in the isolated worktree.
Record the actual participant roster, ownership boundaries, and attempt-specific artifact ownership before the first code slice begins.
Delegate the first bounded implementation slice to the implementation session, and keep Samwise in coordination, gatekeeping, and synthesis scope only unless AJ explicitly authorizes solo fallback.
Require separate product, interaction-quality, and validation review passes, each with red-pen evidence and recorded outputs at the explicit attempt-specific paths.
Run hybrid retrospective closeout through the retrospective session, then update the rerun-prep artifact or a dated successor prep note with carry-forward lessons and next-start conditions.
Pause for AJ review before claiming rerun success, describing the lane as `review-ready` or `MVP candidate`, promoting process changes, or making any branch-promotion recommendation.

acceptanceCriteria: The active Orbit lane is restated with explicit branch, declared worktree path, authorization mode, and artifact paths
Implementation, product review, interaction review, validation review, and retrospective closeout are mapped to explicit session surfaces before coding begins
Samwise does not perform substantive implementation unless AJ explicitly approved solo fallback for the current checkpoint
At least one implementation session and at least two distinct non-implementation review sessions contribute evidence to the run
Participant evidence is explicit for every active role claimed by the rerun
Product acceptance, interaction-quality review, validation closeout, and retrospective closeout are all recorded at attempt-specific paths
The rerun-prep artifact is updated with execution lessons, unresolved issues, and next-start conditions

verification.text: Confirm the active session map names implementation, product, interaction, validation, and retrospective routes explicitly
Confirm participant evidence exists for every active role instead of only planned roles
Confirm Samwise remained coordinator/gatekeeper unless AJ explicitly approved solo fallback
Confirm product acceptance, interaction-quality review, validation closeout, and retrospective closeout all exist before success language is used
